basic_details.job_title: WCD Odisha Anganwadi Worker Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Women and Child Development Odisha (WCD Odisha)
basic_details.short_information: Women and Child Development Odisha (WCD Odisha) Anganwadi Worker Notification 2026 has been released on the official website of WCD Odisha. A total of 2 vacancy has been announced through the WCD Odisha Anganwadi Worker Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.age_details: Min: 18 years, Max: 35 years as of 01.01.2026
age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 18 years Maximum Age: 35 years as of 01.01.2026

qualification.details: Resident of the permanent resident of the area of the center for which the application has been invited. +2 (12th) pass Passed 7th / 10th class in Odia language and can read and write in Odia language. Preference will be given to those with 5 years of experience as Anganwadi Sahayika.

selection_process: Scrutiny of applications Verification of original documents Publication of provisional merit list Hearing of objections Publication of final merit list
how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 24-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of WCD Odisha to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the WCD Odisha Anganwadi Worker recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application for the Anganwadi Worker post is 24-06-2026. Candidates are advised to apply well before this date to avoid any last-minute technical issues.

faq.question: Q2. What are the minimum educational qualifications required for the Anganwadi Worker post?
faq.answer: The minimum educational qualification required is a +2 (12th) pass. Additionally, candidates must have passed the 7th or 10th class in the Odia language and be able to read and write in Odia.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Anganwadi Worker position?
faq.answer: The age limit for the Anganwadi Worker post is between 18 years and 35 years as of 01.01.2026. There might be age relaxations for certain categories as per government rules.

faq.question: Q4. How can I apply for the WCD Odisha Anganwadi Worker job?
faq.answer: Interested candidates can apply online through the official website of WCD Odisha. The application process involves filling out the form, uploading necessary documents, and submitting it before the deadline.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for the WCD Odisha Anganwadi Worker recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification does not mention any application fee for this recruitment drive. Candidates are advised to check the official notification for any updates regarding fees.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for the Anganwadi Worker recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process typically involves the scrutiny of applications, verification of original documents, publication of a provisional merit list, hearing of objections, and finally, the publication of the final merit list.

faq.question: Q7. What documents are required for the Anganwadi Worker application?
faq.answer: Required documents include self-attested copies of educational certificates, mark sheets, resident certificate, caste certificate, age proof, and other relevant certificates as specified in the notification.

faq.question: Q8. Can candidates with experience as Anganwadi Sahayika get preference?
faq.answer: Yes, preference will be given to candidates who have at least 5 years of experience as an Anganwadi Sahayika. This experience can be a significant advantage during the selection process.

faq.question: Q9. What is the job type for the Anganwadi Worker position?
faq.answer: The job type for the Anganwadi Worker position is on a contract basis. This means the employment is for a fixed term as per the terms and conditions of the contract.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification for WCD Odisha Anganwadi Worker recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification can be found on the official website of Women and Child Development Odisha. A direct link to the notification PDF is usually provided in the "Important Links" section of job portals or the official career page.
